modules.title: Quaternionic Delta Encoding
modules.subject: linear-algebra
modules.description: An introduction to quaternionic representations and delta encoding schemes used in hyperdimensional computation.

modules.title: Triple-Quad: 3-Folded Packets
modules.subject: discrete-math
modules.description: Explores triple-quad packet structures and 3-folded encoding for information-dense geometric representations.

modules.title: Quadrance Scaling in Lattice Systems
modules.subject: geometry
modules.description: Develops quadrance — the squared-distance measure of rational trigonometry — across 2D and 3D lattice grids, deriving the general triangle law for displacement between grid vertices.

modules.title: SHD-CCP: The Breathing Substrate
modules.subject: discrete-math
modules.description: Moves from flat, probabilistic computation to a dynamic curved "breathing" manifold, where memory packets are propagated by oscillation of the substrate itself and stabilized against Derrick's theorem.

modules.title: The Torsional Markov Pump
modules.subject: statistics
modules.description: An introduction to the Torsional Markov Pump: builds unit-quaternion rotation frames into a stochastic pump that breaks detailed balance to drive a one-way probability current. Companion tutorial to the TTMPT proof.
